Off Calendar Nov-05-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Justin Mercer of the law offices of LEWIS & LIN LLP (justin@ilaw.com) appears as counsel Pro Hac Vice for moving party, petitioner Incongruity LLC

Attorney, Julie E. Schwartz of the law offices of PERKINS COIE LLP (JSchwartz@perkinscoie.com) appears as counsel for opposing party, respondent

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides on record as reflected in the notes of the Certified Shorthand Reporter.

PETITIONERs INCONGRUITY, LLC, MIKE BOUDET's MOTION / Petition To Enforce Compliance With Third Party Subpoena Directed To Reddit, Inc. is TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION.

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONERs INCONGRUITY, LLC, MIKE BOUDET's MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE:

The verified application of Justin Mercer to appear as counsel pro hac vice to plaintiffs is granted. No opposition filed, and the application conforms to Cal. R. Ct. 9.40.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
